note: Static SBOM for first-party MCP servers. Versions resolved from active Python 3.14 env (C:\Python314). Re-run: python -m pip list > to update.

memory-mcp.notes: sentence-transformers fall-back to TF-IDF if unavailable

skill-manager-mcp.notes: vectordb module from projects/brain-memory/src/ (sys.path sibling); sqlite-vec loaded via vectordb

optional.msal: >=1.0.0 (Azure AD auth; lazy import in fabric_client.py)

fabric-mcp.notes: FABRIC_MOCK=true bypasses all requests; FABRIC_CALLER_TOKEN bearer auth added 2026-04-24

markitdown-mcp.notes: markitdown may pull azure-ai-documentintelligence for advanced OCR

supply_chain_flags.sha_pin_ci: NOT APPLICABLE — no CI pipelines (.github/workflows) in first-party MCP servers
supply_chain_flags.msal_not_installed: msal not in active env; fabric-mcp will fail Azure AD auth if msal absent — install before production use
supply_chain_flags.no_lockfile_prior: requirements.txt files added 2026-04-24; no prior lockfiles existed
supply_chain_flags.checkmarx_incident_ref: 2026-04-22 Checkmarx supply chain compromise via GitHub Actions SHA-tag bypass — not applicable here (no CI), but tag-based GH Actions in any future CI must use SHA pins
